stemHtml: Select the correct statement with regard to the FMC and reduced thrust take-off…

options.a: Reduced thrust is not recommended at very low temperatures (OAT).
options.b: Reduced thrust cannot be used on a contaminated runway.
options.c: Reduced thrust cannot be used on a wet runway.
options.d: Reduced thrust can lower V<sub>MCG</sub> and V<sub>MCA</sub>.
